reviews.name: Elly เอลลี
reviews.text:
No doubt this is a good clinic, doctors are very kind and knowledgeable but the wait time is way too long and the ladies at the front were not very friendly. I waited for 40 minutes and still wasnt able to see the doctor, some people need a quick consultation and get the necessary medication since they are already unwell and in pain. When I went to ask how much longer I had to wait the lady didn’t even look up to acknowledge me. Honestly, if you are in any discomfort and find it hard to even get yourself to the clinic don’t come to this one.

In response to the business owners reply, there were 2 other people at the clinic at the time I was there. One was waiting at least 15 minutes just to get their medication.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hi Elly,
Thank you for your feedback. We’re glad you found our doctors kind and knowledgeable, and we take your concerns seriously. As we serve a high volume of patients, some with complex medical needs, the wait can sometimes be longer than expected. That said, respectful service at all points of care is important, and we’re addressing this with our team. We appreciate you highlighting this and will continue working to improve.

reviews.name: Sandra Ng
reviews.text:
I went to get my braces done and was initially told that after the installation, I would only need to return once a month for regular check-ups and adjustments.
However, within 2 days of getting the braces, one of the brackets came off. I went back to the dentist to fix it, and they asked whether I had eaten anything hard. I explained that I had only been eating blended porridge because my teeth were aching and I had avoided solid food completely.
Over the following weeks, I had to return another 3-4 times because different brackets kept falling off - around 4 more in total. One of the brackets that had already been repaired after the initial installation even came off again after being fixed. At first, the dentist suggested it might be due to my bite and decided to add cement bite blocks to prevent me from biting down on the brackets. This explanation did not fully make sense to me because the brackets were coming off from different teeth each time.
After the bite blocks were added, the dentist then mentioned that the issue could actually be related to the cement/adhesive used during the initial installation. I was told to be patient because I might need to keep returning whenever a bracket came loose.
Within the same week, another bracket came off, and the dentist admitted that the problem was indeed due to the cement used.
Now, today, another 2 brackets have come off again. This will already be my 6th or 7th return visit, despite originally being told I would only need monthly appointments.

reviews.text: I had an excellent experience at Putra Heights Dental Clinic with Dr. Lim Ju Ann. She is incredibly patient and gentle, making sure her patients are comfortable throughout the procedure. The dental treatment was so smoothly done that I hardly felt any discomfort. I was even surprised by how painless the anesthesia jab was, I didn’t feel a thing. Her skills are truly remarkable and the entire process felt flawless. I’ve brought my family here for routine check-ups and treatments and everyone has always spoken highly of her. ownerUpdates.text:
Restoring Damaged Teeth: The Zirconia Advantage

If you have a damaged, cracked, or heavily filled tooth, a crown can restore its strength and appearance. Among modern options, zirconia crowns are increasingly preferred, here’s why.

🦷 What Is a Zirconia Crown?
It’s a custom-made cap crafted from zirconium dioxide,  a strong, biocompatible ceramic material that mimics the look of natural teeth while offering exceptional durability.

Why Patients Love Zirconia Crowns:
✅ Natural Appearance – Translucent like real enamel; blends seamlessly with surrounding teeth
✅ Metal-Free – Ideal for patients with metal sensitivities or those who prefer aesthetic-only materials
✅ Strong & Durable – Resists chipping and cracking better than many other ceramics
✅ Gentle on Gums – Smooth surface reduces irritation and plaque buildup
✅ Long-Lasting – With proper care, can serve you well for 10+ years

Common Uses:
• Restoring teeth after root canal treatment
• Repairing fractured or severely worn teeth
• Covering discolored or misshapen teeth
• Supporting dental bridges

Price : From RM 1500 onwards

Important Notes:
• Requires at least two visits 
• Minimal tooth reduction needed compared to some other crown types
• Color-matched precisely to your smile for invisible results

We believe in helping you make informed decisions. If you’re unsure whether a zirconia crown is right for your case, we’re happy to walk you through your options during a no-obligation consultation

What Is a Dental Implant? A Simple Explanation

Missing a tooth? You’re not alone, and you have more than one option. But if you’re looking for something that feels, looks, and functions like a natural tooth, dental implants are often the gold standard.

🦷 What Exactly Is a Dental Implant?
It’s a small titanium post surgically placed into your jawbone to replace the root of a missing tooth. Once healed, we attach a custom-made crown on top, giving you a complete, functional, and natural-looking tooth.

Why Patients Choose Implants:
✅ Preserves Bone – Prevents jawbone loss that happens after tooth loss
✅ No Damage to Neighbors – Unlike bridges, no need to file down adjacent teeth
✅ Long-Term Solution – With proper care, can last decades or even a lifetime
✅ Natural Feel & Function – Eat, speak, and smile with confidence

What’s Included in Our Price?
• Full implant placement + abutment + zirconia crown
• All-inclusive pricing from RM 6,500 per unit. No hidden fees
• Payment plans available upon request

Important Notes:
• Requires healthy gums and sufficient bone density (we’ll assess this first)
• Healing time varies, typically 3–6 months before final crown is placed
• Success rate is very high when performed by experienced clinicians

We’ve helped many patients regain their smiles and our 4.9-star rating based on 70+ genuine reviews reflects that commitment.

If you’re considering replacing a missing tooth, let’s talk about whether an implant is right for you.

Clear Aligners: Are They Right for You?

Considering straightening your teeth but not sure about braces? 
Clear aligners might be the solution!

🦷 What Are Clear Aligners?
Clear aligners are custom-made, removable trays that gradually shift your teeth into place. They're nearly invisible and can be taken out for eating and brushing.

Who Can Benefit:
• People with teeth misalignment
• Crowded or spaced teeth
• Overbite, underbite, or crossbite
• People wanting a discreet treatment option

Advantages:
✓ Nearly invisible - most people won't notice
✓ Removable - eat what you want, brush easily
✓ More comfortable than traditional braces
✓ Fewer clinic visits

Things to Know:
• Must wear 20-22 hours daily for best results
• Requires commitment and discipline
• Treatment time varies (usually 6-18 months)

Not sure if you're a candidate?

We offer FREE aligner consultations to assess your teeth and discuss whether clear aligners are the right choice for you.

You'll also receive a complimentary goodie bag!

No pressure - just professional advice to help you make an informed decision about your smile.

reviews.text:
Last night, i went to the clinic for the first time and arrived around 9:40pm-ish. I was the last patient because they're about to close at 10pm to request a Medical Leave for today, Monday. I walked to the clinic because i live at main place's residences while being sick, early syptoms of fever and i also had flu yesterday's morning. The two female receiptionist did not smile or greet me at all, the moment i stepped in. One of the receiptionist even handed me a paper to write my latest address in a disrespectful tone.

After i waited for awhile, the doctor in charge already called my name to consult with her which was Dr. Monessha A/P Sooriyamoorthy. The doctor actually peeped through the door between her room and the receiptionist workspace, rudely glared at me and ignore my smile also because i entered just before they were closing up. I did explained to the doctor that i have a psychiatric condition, diagnosed properly, i have the medical record documents both hardcopy and softcopy. I explained to the doctor, I cannot own a lot of medications because of my risky behaviour and trauma towards any pill-shaped medication. The doctor even asked me to repeat my words in a disrecpectful way by saying "Excuse me?' after i innocently explained that i have three mental disabilities disorders. I demanded to the doctor, not giving me any medication and still insist giving me paracetamol for my fever. She even wanted to give medication for my flu, which i also refused because I have every right to cross out any medication. The doctor is unfriendly, gives me a negative vibe. After the consultation settled around 9:50 pm, the receiptionist called out my name for billing, the doctor proceed giving me paracetamol, two papan of them. I informed them, i already told the doctor i cannot have more than one papan, the receiptionist didn't apologise at all. I personally don't want to own any pills because of the history i had before and i don't consume any medication for my psychiatric condition anymore, starting March 2025.

The bill was issued and i asked them nicely if i can wait for awhile because my father wanted to transfer me the amount for the bill and fyi, my father was driving last night. Obviously, i had to wait for awhile so that my father can stop by anywhere to transfer money to my bank account. The receiptionist not only pressured me to pay but proceed telling me to call my father while he was driving, which is very dangerous for my father's safety also. By the way, the receiptionist asked me three times when can i pay which i already explained to both receiptionists that my father was driving and i don't have any money to proceed the payment. After few minutes, i received the amount and proceed my payment, requested a receipt and the receiptionist was refilling the A4 paper which i have to wait for it to be settled also? Unbelievable. The receipt also had nothing stated on it, empty space with only charged for RM50 which i have no clue how much for which and which.

Overall, this was the most disrespectful clinic i ever encountered in my entire life. I will never step my foot here again, i will lodge a complaint against this clinic to Kementerian Kesihatan Malaysia.

reviews.text: This is most incredible dental service I had never been. I followed his instructions and went back to Houston found one really good Gum specialist Dr. Thomas Wright. And guess what? Dr. Thomas Wright confirmed Dr. Tan’s assessment and since then I have been going to Dr. Wright for my gum and cleaning and to this day, my gum is healthy and I am so happy I saved my teeth based on Dr. Tan’s assessment and recommendations! This is highly recommended place for your dental services!

reviews.name: Jean Michele Lee
reviews.text:
A root canal goes rogue. Swollen left cheek, not much pain but I knew something was brewing. I knew I had to do something before my appointment with another dentist on tuesday.
Going to Lee Dental was really a lucky choice, closest to where I live in the USJ area.
Aini, the receptionist was pleasant and kind and we ended up having a lovely conversation. Dr Leong was sympathetic and so understanding. She assessed the situation, scrutinised my teeth (apparently its procedural for them to have a record of status of teeth etc, I thought that to be super cool). She dispensed a
prescription for antibiotics to stem the infection till my appointment.
It was a really nice experience on a Sunday morning. It put my mind at ease and I will definitely consider going back for my yearly scalings.

reviews.name: E.T. Teoh
reviews.text:
Even the strongest go weak at the knees when they visit a Dentist and that was exactly what my Dad felt when he needed Dr Lee to work on him after an unfortunate fall. He sustained a very deep gash in his upper lips that required suturing.

So here's the thing...my Dad has a thing about dentists (I know, don't we all). PTSD you could say so he would avoid one like the plague. But on that very day, his lifelong PTSD was no longer after Dr Lee's hands graced his wounds like the God-tier Dentist that he is.

My Dad was not only in awe over how remarkably pain-free the entire procedure was but also how miraculously smooth the post-procedure / recovery phase has been. If that wasn't good enough, Dr Lee personally followed up with a call a couple days later to check in on my Dad, making sure he was fine!

Dr Lee, from the bottom of our hearts, we thank you and your line of very caring, friendly and professional staff. If I may say, you and your team are truly an asset in our dentistry community.

And for those who need but are worried sick over visiting a dentist, please do yourself a favor and pay Dr Lee a visit.

Absolute GAME-CHANGER!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you so much for your incredibly kind and generous words. I’m truly touched that you took the time to share your dad’s experience.

I completely understand how dental anxiety can feel very real and overwhelming, especially when it’s something someone has carried for years. I’m so glad we were able to make your dad feel comfortable and cared for during what was understandably a stressful situation. Helping patients feel safe and at ease — especially when they need urgent treatment — is always our top priority.

Your dad was incredibly brave throughout the procedure, and it was my privilege to care for him. I’m also very happy to hear that his recovery has been smooth.

On behalf of my entire team, thank you for your trust and for allowing us to be part of his care. We truly appreciate your support and look forward to seeing both of you again — hopefully under less eventful circumstances next time!

reviews.text: I am sorry I have to give this 1 Star rating. I went to to consult Dr Lesley yesterday on my wisdom tooth and she explained everything very clearly and after thinking about it later in the day I decided to do the procedure and I started to request for appointment from the clinic and until now, there is no response and I assume the clinic is not interested to do this procedure. reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Dear Mr. Teng,

Thank you for your feedback.

We apologize for the delay in responding to your appointment request. As your case involved a review of your medical history and medications, it was not a straightforward scheduling process. As part of our standard procedure, we needed to assess whether medical clearance was required to ensure your treatment could be carried out safely.

We understand your frustration and regret that this was not communicated to you earlier. We will work on providing more timely updates to patients whenever additional reviews are needed.

Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.name: raghav
reviews.text:
About a year ago I was attended to by a lady doctor. I believe her name is Dr. Shu. I couldn't remember her name then.
She was gentle and calmly explained the process prior to and as she was performing the extraction. She used only gel. It was surprisingly painless! My phobia was almost gone...almost.
Then yesterday I (quite) bravely went to get a tooth extraction again. I admit that I delayed a bit but thought about my pleasant experience with Dr. Shu and proceeded.
What followed was A NIGHTMARISH EXPERIENCE!
I insisted on a lady doctor but couldn't recall her name at that moment.
For some very strange reason, the receptionist and someone else avoided my request and sent me to a young guy (Joshua) who was waiting for me.
I was in great pain and reluctantly proceeded. What followed was a disaster..A horrible  NIGHTMARE!
After applying the gel and around 3-4 injections later he attempted to extract my tooth (molar). The pain was extremely EXCRUCIATING!!
I made a sound of pain - total pain. It was like extracting my tooth without any anesthetic!
He then told me he'll "top-up" and continued to apply extra  gel and another 3-4 injections.
Then said there'll be no pain and began extracting my tooth.
The pain was SO INTENSE that I almost passed out.
My phobia immediately returned. From then on it was fear.
When I returned home I began thinking why it hurt me so much. It dawned on me that he extracted my tooth about less than 10 seconds after the injections.
Shouldn't be have waited for the anesthetic to take effect before he roughly extracted my tooth??
I find it all so strange. The second worse factor is my phobia is now even worse.
He also said that if my tooth was infected and that he'll give me anti-biotics. It was but I never was prescribed any anti-biotic. So Dr. Shu, please look into this matter as it was a harrowing experience and I do not wish any one else who has a phobia to go through this nightmare.
My cheek is still swollen. I can only hope it's normal.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
I’m truly sorry to hear about your recent experience at our clinic. Your feedback is important to us, and I apologize for any inconvenience caused. However, we would be happy to arrange a meeting with one of our senior doctors to address any concerns and ensure you receive the care you deserve. Please let us know if this is something you’d be interested in.

Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.text: 之前常去的牙科诊所，最后几次令我很失望😞，最失望的是牙医的不诚实，觉得自己被欺骗了。后来，看到这家佳护牙科好评很高，就抱着试试的心情。果然这家诊所好评高是真的，我亲自体验到了😁。我一连几次见过陈舒雯医生和林淑媚医生。两位牙医经验丰富，技术精湛，操作轻柔。整个補牙过程都很顺利也不大痛😄。诊所员工也很友善，礼貌。我强烈推荐大家去这家诊所!
reviews.textTranslated: I was very disappointed with the dental clinics I used to frequent a few times 😞, especially by the dentists' dishonesty; I felt cheated. Later, I saw that Jiahu Dental Clinic had very high ratings, so I decided to give it a try. And the high ratings were definitely genuine – I experienced it for myself 😁. I saw Dr. Chen Shuwen and Dr. Lin Shumei several times. Both dentists are experienced, highly skilled, and gentle. The entire filling process was smooth and not very painful 😄. The clinic staff were also very friendly and polite. I highly recommend this clinic!

reviews.text: Not transparent. Lol i see ur reply 30 minutes of consultation?what consultation give me mirror and say this treatment is rm1500 total ?in whatsapp i ask how much you refuse to say price saying start from 400 and i ask roughly how much you refuse to give and say let our dr check so we can tell the price(never mention there is charges). Nevertheless, all our fees are clearly stated transparently in the clinics pricelist on the counter for our patient to reference before proceeding with any consultation with our drs.

reviews.name: irza shahril mohd razali
reviews.text:
To summarize in one word, the services and care I received during my procedure at this clinic was "Excellent".

After enduring for about a week of jaw and tooth ache, the pain got too much to handle on a Saturday afternoon and was recommended this place by my mother. Got my first checkup on the same day and was prescribed medication to reduce the pain. The issue turns out to be a half rotten wisdom tooth (upper gums) and an appointment was set for the following day.

The next day, after exchanging pleasantries Dr. Nacha started the procedure. There was no pain what so ever due to the anesthetics but the pressure felt and sounds I heard was nerve wreaking. My wisdom tooth had been reduced to a "U" shaped mess and the removal was time consuming to say the least. Overall, the extraction took over 2 hours to complete without surgery but required some stiches to close the gaping hole left in my gums.

Dr. Nacha was thoughtful and caring throughout the procedure and I will definitely be recommending this place too after this. Many thanks to her.

11 May - Went for dental filling, scalling and checkup on my gums health. Dr. Nacha is as lovely and caring as always. Went home with 5 fillings and feeling much better. Many thanks!

ownerUpdates.text: A straighter smile can improve both oral health and confidence. Braces USJ Subang are designed to correct misaligned teeth, overcrowding, gaps, and bite issues that may affect chewing, speech, and daily oral hygiene. By gradually guiding teeth into their proper positions, braces can help reduce the risk of tooth decay, gum problems, and uneven tooth wear. Modern orthodontic options are suitable for both teenagers and adults, offering effective solutions for a wide range of alignment concerns. Choosing Braces USJ Subang can support long-term dental health while helping you achieve a more balanced, functional, and confident smile.

Missing teeth can affect chewing, speech, and overall confidence, making tooth replacement an important part of oral health care. Dentures USJ Subang are a common solution designed to restore function and improve the appearance of your smile. Depending on individual needs, options may include full dentures to replace all teeth or partial dentures to replace several missing teeth while preserving natural ones. A dental assessment can help determine the most suitable option based on oral health and lifestyle factors. Choosing Dentures USJ Subang can support everyday comfort, improve dental function, and help maintain a healthier, more confident smile over the long term.

A cracked tooth should be assessed by a dental professional as soon as possible to prevent further damage. Before your appointment, avoid chewing on the affected side and rinse your mouth gently with warm water to keep the area clean. If swelling or discomfort occurs, a cold compress applied to the outside of the cheek may provide temporary relief. While these steps can help manage symptoms, they do not replace professional care. Seeking cracked tooth treatment USJ Subang promptly allows a dentist to evaluate the extent of the damage and recommend appropriate treatment. Early cracked tooth treatment USJ Subang can help protect long-term oral health.

Wisdom teeth can sometimes cause problems when there is not enough space for them to grow properly. Common symptoms that may indicate the need for wisdom tooth extraction USJ Subang include pain at the back of the mouth, swollen or tender gums, jaw discomfort, difficulty chewing, and recurring infections around the affected area. In some cases, wisdom teeth may become impacted, placing pressure on neighbouring teeth and affecting overall oral health. A dental examination can help determine the cause of these symptoms and whether treatment is necessary. Considering wisdom tooth extraction USJ Subang may help prevent future complications and support long-term oral wellbeing.

Tartar is hardened plaque that can build up on teeth over time and cannot be removed through brushing alone. Common signs that you may need tartar removal in USJ Subang include yellow or brown deposits on the teeth, persistent bad breath, bleeding gums, gum sensitivity, or a rough feeling along the gumline. If left untreated, tartar accumulation may contribute to gum inflammation and other oral health concerns. Professional dental cleaning helps remove tartar safely and effectively while supporting healthier gums and cleaner teeth. Seeking tartar removal in USJ Subang can be an important step in maintaining good oral hygiene and long-term dental health.

Good oral health starts with consistent habits and regular dental visits. Preventive dental care USJ Subang focuses on identifying and addressing potential dental concerns before they develop into more serious problems. Routine check-ups, professional cleanings, and oral health assessments can help reduce the risk of tooth decay, gum disease, and other common dental issues. Preventive care also supports early detection, allowing for timely treatment when needed. By prioritising preventive dental care USJ Subang, patients can maintain healthier teeth and gums, improve long-term oral wellbeing, and potentially reduce the need for more complex dental procedures in the future.

Proper dental alignment plays an important role in maintaining oral health and everyday comfort. Orthodontic treatment Subang Jaya can help correct issues such as crowded teeth, spacing problems, overbites, underbites, and other bite irregularities that may affect chewing, speaking, and oral hygiene. By gradually moving teeth into more ideal positions, orthodontic treatment can improve function, support healthier gums, and reduce uneven wear on teeth. Treatment options may include braces or clear aligners, depending on individual needs. Choosing orthodontic treatment Subang Jaya can help create a more balanced bite, improve smile aesthetics, and support long-term dental health and confidence.

reviews.name: Wendy Chau
reviews.text: I experienced pain when eating after my filling. The dentist who did my first filling on Sunday was a part-time doctor. I informed her that the pain was still there after the filling, but she said it would go away. As the pain persisted, I returned the next morning to see another dentist. Unfortunately, the dentist did not review my records and asked me the same questions again. After taking another X-ray, the filling was redone, but the procedure was very painful despite the anaesthetic, which only numbed my gums, not the tooth. My pain is still there, and the issue remains unresolved. Overall, I am disappointed with the professionalism and treatment I received.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We are sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations.

Please be assured that our doctors carry out assessments and provide treatment based on the clinical findings and the patient’s condition during each visit. In some situations, additional questions or reassessment may be necessary to ensure appropriate clinical decision-making at that point in time.

We understand your disappointment regarding your overall experience and truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us continue improving our service and patient communication.

Thank you again for your review and for choosing our clinic.

ownerUpdates.text:
Professional Teeth Whitening vs Whitening Toothpaste

Thinking about whitening your teeth but unsure whether a whitening toothpaste is enough?

Whitening toothpastes and professional teeth whitening serve different purposes and can produce different results.

Whitening toothpastes mainly help remove surface stains caused by foods, drinks, and daily habits. They can be useful for maintaining cleanliness and reducing minor staining over time.

Professional whitening treatments, on the other hand, are designed to address deeper stains and brighten the overall shade of your teeth more effectively. The treatment is performed under professional supervision and tailored according to your oral health and whitening goals.

It's also important to remember that not all tooth discolouration is the same. Some stains respond well to regular cleaning and polishing, while others may require whitening treatment for noticeable improvement.

At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, we assess each patient's teeth individually and recommend suitable options based on their needs and expectations.

If you've been wondering whether whitening toothpaste is enough or if professional whitening may be suitable for you, we're happy to help answer your questions.

Does Teeth Whitening Cause Sensitivity?

One of the most common questions we receive about teeth whitening is:
“Will my teeth become sensitive afterwards?”

Some patients may experience temporary sensitivity after whitening treatment, especially if they already have naturally sensitive teeth. This sensitivity is usually mild and improves over time.

At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, whitening treatments are performed carefully after assessing your oral health and suitability for treatment. Factors such as existing tooth sensitivity, gum condition, cavities, or exposed tooth surfaces may influence how comfortable the whitening process feels.

Professional whitening differs from over-the-counter products because the treatment is supervised and tailored according to the patient’s needs. Using whitening products incorrectly or too frequently without professional guidance may increase the risk of discomfort or uneven results.

Before starting whitening treatment, we will assess your teeth and explain the most suitable options based on your condition and goals.

If you’ve been considering teeth whitening but are concerned about sensitivity, our team is happy to answer your questions and help you make an informed decision.

Have you ever wondered why teeth become yellow over time?

Tooth discolouration is very common and can happen gradually due to everyday habits and natural aging. At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, some of the most common causes of staining we see include coffee, tea, coloured beverages, smoking, and certain foods that leave pigments on the tooth surface over time.

As we age, the outer enamel layer of the teeth can also become thinner, making the naturally darker inner layer of the tooth more visible. In some cases, staining may also be related to medications, trauma, or long-term plaque and tartar buildup.

Not all tooth stains are the same — some are surface stains that respond well to scaling and polishing, while others may require professional whitening treatment depending on the cause and severity.

Maintaining good oral hygiene, regular dental visits, and being mindful of staining foods and drinks can help reduce discolouration and keep your smile looking brighter.

If you’re concerned about tooth staining or would like to learn more about whitening options, our team at Pixel Dental is happy to help 😊

Why Regular Braces Reviews Are Important?

Braces treatment is more than just putting brackets on teeth — regular review appointments are an important part of ensuring your treatment progresses smoothly and safely.

At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, braces review visits allow us to monitor tooth movement, make necessary adjustments, and ensure everything is progressing according to plan. These appointments also help identify issues early, such as loose brackets, wire discomfort, or areas that may require extra attention.

Consistent follow-ups are important because every patient’s teeth respond differently to treatment. Missing reviews for long periods may affect treatment progress and overall results.

During your review visits, we may:
• Adjust wires or elastics
• Monitor alignment progress
• Check oral hygiene around braces
• Ensure brackets and appliances remain in good condition

Maintaining good oral hygiene and attending scheduled reviews can help support a smoother braces journey and more predictable treatment outcomes.

If you’re considering braces or would like to learn more about orthodontic treatment options, our team at Pixel Dental is happy to help.

Message us to learn more or book a consultation.

How Much Do Braces Cost in Subang Jaya?
If you’re considering braces, one of the first questions that comes to mind is the cost.

At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, braces pricing can vary depending on several factors, including the type of braces chosen and the complexity of your case.

Different options such as conventional braces, self-ligating braces, and clear aligners each come with their own treatment approach and pricing range. Mild cases may require simpler treatment, while more complex alignment or bite issues may involve a longer treatment duration.

It’s important to note that braces treatment is usually a long-term process, and costs may be structured in stages to make it more manageable for patients.

During your consultation, we will assess your teeth, explain the available options, and provide a clear breakdown of pricing so you understand exactly what to expect before starting treatment.

If you’ve been considering braces but are unsure about the cost, a consultation is the best way to get accurate information tailored to your needs.

Message us to learn more or book your consultation

Braces vs Clear Aligners: Which Is Right for You?

If you’re considering orthodontic treatment, you may be wondering whether braces or clear aligners are the better option.

At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, both options are commonly used to improve teeth alignment, but they work in slightly different ways.

Traditional braces use brackets and wires to gradually move teeth into position. They are suitable for a wide range of cases, including more complex alignment or bite issues.

Clear aligners, on the other hand, are removable and more discreet. They can be a good option for mild to moderate cases and are popular among adults who prefer a less visible alternative.

Each option has its own advantages depending on your lifestyle, treatment goals, and the condition of your teeth. Some patients prefer the flexibility of aligners, while others benefit more from the precision of braces.

The best way to determine which option is suitable for you is through a proper assessment. During your consultation, we will evaluate your teeth and explain the most appropriate treatment options based on your needs.

If you’ve been deciding between braces and aligners, we’re here to help you make an informed choice.

Message us to learn more or book your consultation

What Foods Should You Avoid With Braces?

If you have braces or are planning to get them, you may be wondering what foods to avoid.

At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, we usually advise patients to be mindful of certain foods that may damage brackets or wires, or make cleaning more difficult.

Hard foods such as ice, nuts, and hard candies can put excessive pressure on braces and may cause breakages. Sticky foods like caramel, chewing gum, or toffee can get caught around brackets and are often difficult to remove. Very crunchy foods, including popcorn or chips, may also increase the risk of damaging your braces.

It’s also a good idea to be cautious with foods that require biting directly, such as apples or corn on the cob. Cutting them into smaller pieces can help reduce strain on your braces.

Maintaining good oral hygiene is especially important during braces treatment, as food particles can get trapped more easily around brackets and wires.

With the right care and food choices, you can keep your braces in good condition and ensure a smoother treatment journey.

If you have questions about braces care or are considering starting treatment, feel free to reach out to our team.

Message us to learn more or book your consultation

Thinking about getting braces but worried about pain?

This is one of the most common concerns we hear at Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya.

The good news is that braces do not cause constant pain. When braces are first placed or adjusted, you may feel some pressure or mild discomfort for a few days. This is a normal part of the process as your teeth gradually move into better alignment.

Most patients describe the feeling as soreness rather than pain, and it usually settles within a few days. Over-the-counter pain relief and softer foods can help during this period.

Modern braces systems, including self-ligating braces and clear aligners, are designed to be more comfortable and efficient compared to traditional methods.

Our goal is always to make your treatment as gentle and comfortable as possible, while achieving the best long-term results.

If you’ve been putting off braces because of fear, you’re not alone — and we’re here to guide you through every step.

Message us to learn more or book your consultation

How Long Do Braces Take?
One of the most common questions we hear is: how long do braces take?

The duration of braces treatment varies depending on your individual case. At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, most patients typically wear braces for around 12 to 24 months. However, this can be shorter or longer depending on factors such as crowding, spacing, bite alignment, and how your teeth respond to treatment.

Mild cases may take less time, while more complex cases may require a longer treatment period. Consistency is also important — attending regular follow-ups and maintaining good oral hygiene can help ensure smoother progress.

It’s also worth noting that different types of braces, including conventional braces, self-ligating braces, and clear aligners, may have slightly different treatment timelines depending on suitability.

During your consultation, we will assess your teeth and provide a clearer estimate tailored specifically to your condition.

If you’ve been thinking about braces but are unsure about the commitment, starting with a consultation is the best first step.

Message us to learn more or book your consultation

What Happens During a Braces Consultation?
If you’re considering braces, one of the most common questions is what actually happens during the first consultation. At Pixel Dental Clinic in SS17 Subang Jaya, a braces consultation is a simple and informative process designed to help you understand your options clearly before making any decisions.

During the visit, our dental team will first examine your teeth and bite to assess alignment, spacing, and overall oral condition. We may take photos or X-rays if needed to better understand your case. This helps us identify whether braces or other orthodontic options may be suitable for you.

We’ll then explain your current condition, discuss possible treatment approaches, and answer any questions you may have. If braces are recommended, we will go through the different types available, expected treatment duration, and what to expect throughout the process. Every case is different, so recommendations are always tailored to your needs.

A consultation is also a good opportunity to understand maintenance, oral hygiene, and how braces may fit into your daily routine. There is no pressure to proceed immediately — the goal is to provide clarity so you can make an informed decision.

If you’re thinking about braces, starting with a proper assessment is the best first step.

reviews.name: SK
reviews.text: I saw Dr Wong on 27 June 2016. She was meant to do a quick check on my teeth but instead drilled through without briefing me on what it meant and gave me a poor filling. After failing to fix the filling, I got someone else to fix it, but I will never forgive Dr Wong for the lifetime of pain she now left me.

reviews.name: Pj Lee
reviews.text:
Was attended by Dr Trilochan a very caring dentist. She did my bridge work before and today on my latest visit a root canal. Am not the easiest of patients, I told her given a choice between seeing a ghost and a dentist, I will choose the ghost anytime. Ghosts they can only frighten you but a dentist with her armoury of drills, needles and pliers they are a different ball game. I will lie if I say the root canal was a piece of cake, it was okay because Dr Trilochan at every stage was comforting me to make the whole experience okay, giving me time even to say a short prayer. What makes her stand out is not only her expertise but her understanding of the fear of an adult turned child on the dentist chair.

My follow up visit after a week break to complete the root canal treatment. I noticed as before that most of Dr Trilochan patients are senior citizens. Sure we seniors tend to have more dental problems but on the other hand, we seniors are also much wiser as well. What we want is a dentist who is EXPERIENCED and CARING. When someone is holding a drill in hand, we want that person to be only one thing, EXPERIENCED and I had such a dentist attending to me.
Must mention here as well the super woman behind the dentist Ms Devi. She is what multi skilling personified means. She is the receptionist, the cashier, the dentist assistant, the x-ray operator and also the one who cleans up after all is done. With this post I pray I don't have to visit Lim Dental again unless absolutely necessary or I need a ghost more fearsome than a dentist.

reviews.name: Ravindran Rajendran
reviews.text:
We are deeply disappointed and frustrated by our recent experience at SJMC. After placing our trust in this hospital for more than 12 years, a comprehensive health screening concluded that there were no significant findings. However, a subsequent routine bedside ultrasound at another clinic clearly identified a kidney tumour.

This is a very serious oversight and raises concerns about the accuracy and reliability of the health screening process. The purpose of undergoing a comprehensive medical screening is to detect potentially life-threatening conditions at an early stage. Missing such a critical finding is unacceptable and has severely affected our confidence in the care provided.

We sincerely hope SJMC conducts a thorough investigation into this case and takes the necessary steps to strengthen its screening and reporting processes so that no other patient has to experience the same situation.

reviews.name: Nurain Nabilah Salehuddin
reviews.text:
I went to check-up the huge hole on my bottom molar. Dr. David suggested I do an x-ray to confirm and as it turns out the nerve has been affected and the tooth is already necrotic. He was thorough with the explanation of the problem and solution. He even provided the costs without me needing to ask, which I find nice and such a transparent thing to do to the patients.

After going through the solutions, I proceeded with extraction and essix retainer to delay the teeth shifting while I ponder if I wanted to do an implant.

Tooth extraction was quick and painless. I am afraid of having needles going into my gums, but the Dr. put on numbing cream before so I felt nothing. Had to do a double shot though because I felt a tiniest sting when he was working on my gums. But after that, the process was completely painless.

The recovery was smooth sailing. Followed the aftercare to avoid dry socket. I was prescribed with painkiller after having a bit of trouble sleeping. Then , I had a quick visit to make an impression for my retainer and was able to pick it up after a few days!

Everyone was reassuring and gentle throughout my visits here.

The procedures and prices:
X-ray: RM100
Normal extraction: RM150
Essix retainer + 1 pontic tooth: RM250 + RM50

Anyway, overall, I had a pleasant experience here, from the doctor, DAs and staff alike. I think this might be my go-to dental clinic from now on!
